methodsAttempted.query: opencli google search 'site:unimelb.edu.au generative AI student policy'
DuckDuckGo: "University of Melbourne" generative AI policy
methodsAttempted.notes: DuckDuckGo browser search via OpenCLI. Found 7 results across unimelb.edu.au subdomains. All main content URLs return 403 (Cloudflare challenge).
Policy hub returns 200 but specific policy pages (MPF1310, MPF1321) blocked by Incapsula WAF.

methodsAttempted.query: Direct URL probing of unimelb.edu.au subdomains
methodsAttempted.notes: All probed subdomains (teaching, study, staff, library, academicintegrity) return 403 Cloudflare challenges.

summary: Found 5 verified candidates for University of Melbourne. All content URLs are blocked by Cloudflare challenge (HTTP 403 with cf-mitigated: challenge header) and need browser rendering (Playwright/OpenCLI). Key sources identified: GenAI at Melbourne (student guidance), Melbourne CSHE teaching guidance, official AI integrity statements, government inquiry submission PDF, and Melbourne School of Design AI guide. 5 rejected: Emeritus third-party platform, 2 Incapsula-blocked policy pages, generic policy portal, low-specificity IP paper. OpenCLI Google search was blocked; used DuckDuckGo browser search as fallback.
